lastReleaseMessage: library: grid-auto-rows:150px so tiles can't collapse short; tile fills cell at 100%/100%; container 480px tall for three rows; images stop overflowing into the next row

barRaise.topFinding: Fifth consecutive report, fourth day with zero remediation movement. HEAD is still v0.15.12 (453d206, 2026-06-01); no commit has landed in four days. The three standing HIGH findings are byte-for-byte unchanged: write-dashboard-status.ps1 still hardcodes barRaise to all-null, audit.findings to 0/0/0, and workQueueDepth to 0; the 47 em-dashes still ship across the six public files (27/8/6/4/1/1); and .work-queue.json still holds 18 pending YaA items, the oldest now 18 days, none drained. The prior verdict was stalled and the picture is unchanged 24 hours later, so it stays stalled. The label engine itself remains healthy; the entire risk surface is the docs / dashboard / work-queue perimeter, where the same findings have now persisted across five reports without a single closing action.
